items.name: Foundation Top1 Microsoft Overlap Circle Set
items.layout_role: three-item overlapping gradient circle milestone row
items.visual_summary: Three overlapping blue-to-white gradient circles in a horizontal row, each with a numbered rank ('01'/'02'/'03'), a category label, and a headline achievement. The middle headline is the intentional HERO: h1 at 134px against h2 at 61px and 53px in the outer circles (~2.2x), so the set reads as one standout flanked by two supporting highlights — not as three equal levels.
use_cases: Milestone/achievement timeline with 3 ranked highlights
Company track-record or growth-story visual
anti_use_cases: Do not reuse the specific company names/metrics for unrelated brand content without editing text slots.
Do not use for a sequential or procedural workflow, a step-by-step how-to, or a process sequence flow: this is a set of parallel ranked milestone circles, not a sequence.

Do not use for a balanced tier/level ladder, maturity model or capability ladder: the middle circle's headline is deliberately ~2.2x the outer two (h1 134px vs h2 61px/53px), so three equal-weight levels render with a false hierarchy that says the middle tier is the point.
items.quality_notes: Manually extracted; Docling had merged this with two unrelated diagram groups on the same page into one oversized region. Cropped and re-verified against source render.
items.retrieval_notes: Region isolated manually from page 3 of GUIDLINE_PRESENTATION_SUN.pdf; not a Docling auto-detected candidate.
limitations: Text overflow is intentionally unmanaged; callers may edit content, font size, and bounds.

immutable_text.reason: Empty-slot render (2026-07-16 immutable-text audit, re-run after the slot alignment correction) shows no words at all: the artwork is three gradient circles and every string a viewer reads comes from an editable slot.

auto_reuse.reason: Not fit for automatic full-bleed reuse at 1920x1080. Its artwork is a wide band (aspect 3.23:1), so a background-size:cover materialization scales it to fill the 1080px height and crops 45% of its width off the frame — the outer two circles fall off both slide edges (verified in the 2026-07-16 milestone QA render). The surviving outer-circle labels also render white on the light end of the gradient at low contrast (WCAG ~2.2-3.9). Contract fidelity passes (slot geometry is preserved, cov=1.0) but the rendered result is not audience-ready. Kept published and browseable for manual placement; blocked from automatic selection. See validate_component_fidelity.render_fitness.

Failed full-slide QA (2026-07-13 distinct-deck): the wide hexagon diagram is cover-cropped at 1920x1080 — the GOAL and TASK lobes fall outside the frame and their slot text no longer aligns with the artwork. Review-only until re-cropped or re-extracted at deck aspect.
